notes: Test expectations for e2e-photos. Update manually when test assets change.

semanticSearch.notes: Prompt cases for semantic search ranking validation.

promptCases.prompt: Selfie of bald man with woman in glasses

unconfirmedFaceSearch.notes: Expectations for the 'include unconfirmed similar faces' toggle in semantic search. The person in face-detect-sample-01.jpg also appears in the unconfirmedImage. Tagging one face in the confirmed image and enabling the unconfirmed toggle should surface the unconfirmed image.

rotationBwSamples.notes: Paired B&W JPEGs in this folder (rotated-bw-01 from legacy dated filename; rotated-bw-02 renamed from scan0014.jpg). Not asserted by Playwright today; keep names stable for local rotation or path-metadata checks.

yoloFaceDetection.notes: Images that must yield at least one face when running local ONNX YOLOv12 Small (akanametov/yolo-face). Requires downloading yolov12s-face.onnx on first run.
